name: DCE Current for Consequential Actions
description: Consequential actions may proceed only while the referenced Deterministic Control Envelope (AlgoCertificate) is current and not invalidated.
rationale: A DCE is invalidated by any material change to model version, prompt class, or inference configuration; acting under an invalidated DCE is a Red containment event.

examples.fails: Release after the DCE was invalidated by a model-version change

source: FIX AI WG — Proposal on Agentic AI Runtime Governance (Healey & Houston, 12 Jun 2026); governance conditions per Szpruch, Sudjianto, Bhatti & Ang (2026), 'Scalable Runtime Governance for Agentic AI in Financial Services'.
